context.audience: Backend developers responsible for production reliability, DevOps engineers building observability stacks, startup CTOs setting up monitoring before scaling
pain_points: Choosing between Sentry, Datadog, Grafana, and open-source monitoring stacks
Tracking LLM API costs, latency, and error rates across different providers
Setting up meaningful alerts without alert fatigue in small teams
Distributed tracing for AI pipelines with multiple service calls
Cost-effective monitoring that scales with the application
content_that_works: LLM monitoring and cost tracking tutorials
